## Test plan

- [ ] `node import.mjs --dry-run` passes

## Checklist

- [ ] No company-specific data, paths, or client names
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or API keys
- [ ] Commit messages follow conventional commits (no AI slop)
- [ ] Docs updated where relevant (README, CONTRIBUTING, skill/agent frontmatter)
